conservative.name: Whirlwind
conservative.check: Weapon Skill (St) vs Highest Target Defence
conservative.requirements: Melee weapon in each hand, engaged with at least 1 target

success.description: You spin in a deadly arc, dealing 1 wound to all enemies engaged with you

boon.description: You and each ally engaged with you may recover 1 fatigue

bane.description: You drop one of your weapons (your choice)

sigmarsComet.description: You hit an enemy in your engagement with you secondary weapon for normal damage

reckless.name: Whirlwind
reckless.check: Weapon Skill (St) vs Highest Target Defence
reckless.requirements: Melee weapon in each hand, engaged with at least 1 target

success.description: You hit your target an each enemy in your engagement for -1 damage
You hit your target and each enemy in your engagement for -2 damage, plus your secondary weapon's Damage Rating

chaosStar.description: Suffer 1 fatigue per enemy in the engagement

sigmarsComet.description: Deal 1 critical wound to the primary target, then deal additional damage equal to that critical's severity divided as you choose amongst other targets
